reportNames: 技术中心督导中心正式
新模头设计任务督导中心
families.representativeSql:
SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,A.Description,A.StartDate,A.DueDate,
A.Number01,a.Number02,A.date20,A.DateComplete,A.PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' WHEN A.PhaseStatus='C' THEN N'完成' ELSE N'未开始' END AS PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete > A.DueDate) THEN N'延期完成' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete <= A.DueDate) THEN N'正常完成' 
ELSE N'未开始' END AS fxPhaseStatus,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.Date20,120)+' '+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number01/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number01-floor(A.Number01/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) AS TDate20,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.DateComplete,120)+' '+ RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number02/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number02-floor(A.Number02/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) as TDateComplete,
A.PercentComplete,A.Duration,CASE WHEN A.DurationType='D' THEN N'天' ELSE N'小时' END AS DurationType,
A.Character01,B.Description AS pDesc,A.CheckBox20,A.Character10 ,A.Character02,c.Name ,b.StartDate,b.EndDate
FROM ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN erp.Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
LEFT JOIN erp.UserFile c
ON a.Character01 = c.DcdUserID
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'  AND A.ParentPhase =N'工艺部'
and A.DueDate >='2020-07-01' and A.DueDate <='2022-12-31'
  ${if(len(状态)==0,"","and  A.PhaseStatus in ('"+状态+"')")}
  ${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and  A.ProjectID='"+产品编号+"'")} 
   ${if (len(实际完工日期大于)==0,"","and A.DateComplete>='"+实际完工日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(实际完工日期小于)==0,""," and A.DateComplete<='"+实际完工日期小于+"'")}
  ${if (len(加工开始日期大于)==0,"","and A.date20>='"+加工开始日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(加工开始日期小于)==0,"","and A.date20<='"+加工开始日期小于+"'")}
ORDER BY a.sortseq

coreJoins: PUB.ECORev -> PUB.ECOMtl ON Company + AltMethod + GroupID + PartNum + RevisionNum
families.representativeSql:
SELECT a.PartNum,a.RevisionNum,a.Approved,a.ApprovedBy, a.ApprovedDate,b.PullAsAsm,b.ViewAsAsm,
b.QtyPer,b.MtlSeq,b.MtlPartNum,b.MfgComment,c.PartDescription
FROM PUB.ECORev a
LEFT JOIN PUB.ECOMtl b 
ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.RevisionNum = b.RevisionNum AND a.PartNum = b.PartNum AND a.GroupID = b.GroupID AND a.AltMethod = b.AltMethod )
LEFT JOIN PUB.Part c
ON (b.MtlPartNum= c.PartNum AND b.Company = c.Company)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' 
order by b.mtlseq asc

reportNames: 采购阶段每日到料情况
coreJoins: PUB.JobOper -> PUB.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
PUB.OpMaster -> PUB.JobOpDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq
PUB.ResourceGroup -> PUB.LaborDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq
families.representativeReportName: 采购阶段每日到料情况
families.representativeSql:
SELECT
case when h.Description IS NULL   then '未派发'
else h.Description end as 'fx',

      count(A3.Description) as nDescription

       FROM PUB.JobHead b
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobOper a ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.JobNum = b.JobNum)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobAsmbl A3 ON (A.JobNum=A3.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=A3.AssemblySeq AND A.Company=A3.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.OpMaster C ON (A.OpCode=C.OpCode AND A.Company=C.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.JobOpDtl D ON (A.JobNum=D.JobNum AND A.AssemblySeq=D.AssemblySeq AND A.OprSeq=D.OprSeq AND A.Company=D.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB.ResourceGroup E ON (D.ResourceGrpID=E.ResourceGrpID AND D.Company=E.Company) 
       LEFT JOIN PUB."Resource" h ON (d.ResourceID = h.ResourceID AND D.Company=h.Company)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.LaborDtl f ON (f.JobNum= a.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq = a.AssemblySeq AND f.OprSeq= a.OprSeq AND f.Company = a.company)
       LEFT JOIN PUB.EmpBasic AS g
ON g.EmpID = f.EmployeeNum AND g.Company = f.Company
WHERE b.Company ='jctimes' AND b.ReqDueDate >='2020-1-1' AND a.Date20>='2020-2-1'
 AND A.OpComplete<>1   and a.opcode='wb'
GROUP BY case when h.Description IS NULL   then '未派发'
else h.Description end
order by b.ReqDueDate

coreJoins: PUB.PODetail -> PUB.PORel ON Company + POLine + PONUM
families.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,c.VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease FROM PUB.POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PUB.PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN PUB.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN PUB.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN PUB.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2018-10-25' AND a.Approve ='1'
AND c.VendorID <>'1019'
 ${if (len(采购员)==0,"","and d.Name='"+采购员+"'")}
order by  ${cname} ${orderby}

SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,A.Description,A.StartDate,A.DueDate,
A.Number01,a.Number02,A.date20,A.DateComplete,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN '加工中' WHEN A.PhaseStatus='C' THEN '完成' ELSE '未开始' END AS PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN '加工中' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete > A.DueDate) THEN '延期完成' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete <= A.DueDate) THEN '正常完成' 
ELSE '未开始' END AS fxPhaseStatus,
to_char(A.Date20,'YYYY-MM-DD')+' '+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number01/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+
RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number01-floor(A.Number01/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) AS TDate20,
to_char(A.DateComplete,'YYYY-MM-DD')+' '+ RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number02/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+
RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number02-floor(A.Number02/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) as TDateComplete,
A.PercentComplete,A.Duration,CASE WHEN A.DurationType='D' THEN '天' ELSE '小时' END AS DurationType,
A.Character01,B.Description AS pDesc,A.CheckBox20,A.Character10 ,A.Character02,A.Character09,c.Name 
FROM PUB.ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN PUB.Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.UserFile c
ON a.Character01 = c.DcdUserID
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'  AND A.ParentPhase ='技术部'
and A.DueDate >='2017-01-01' and A.DueDate <='2017-12-31'
 ${if (len(要求完工日期大于)==0,"","and A.DueDate>='"+要求完工日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(要求完工日期小于)==0,"","and A.DueDate<='"+要求完工日期小于+"'")}
 ${if(len(父阶段)==0,"","and  A.ParentPhase in ('"+父阶段+"')")}
  ${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and  A.ProjectID='"+产品编号+"'")} 
  ${if (len(提交者)==0,"","and  A.Character01='"+提交者+"'")} 
   ${if (len(实际完工日期大于)==0,"","and A.date20>='"+实际完工日期大于+"'")}
 ${if (len(实际完工日期小于)==0,"","and A.date20<='"+实际完工日期小于+"'")}
ORDER BY a.sortseq

families.representativeSql:
SELECT a.WarehouseCode,a.PartNum,Convert(int,a.OnHandQty ) AS onhandq ,
a.SafetyQty,a.MinimumQty,a.MaximumQty,b.PartDescription FROM erp.PartWhse a
LEFT JOIN erp.Part b ON (a.PartNum = b.PartNum AND a.Company = b.Company)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.WarehouseCode='pjc001' AND a.SafetyQty>'0' 
AND a.SafetyQty > a.OnHandQty
order by Convert(int,a.OnHandQty )

SELECT a.WarehouseCode,a.PartNum,Convert(a.OnHandQty AS INTEGER(10)) AS onhandq ,
a.SafetyQty,a.MinimumQty,a.MaximumQty,b.PartDescription FROM PUB.PartWhse a

families.representativeSql:
--已完工项目进度查询
select a.PartNum,b.PartNum PartNum2,a.OrderNum,a.OrderLine,b.OrderLine OrderLine2 
into #AAA
from erp.OrderDtl a
inner join erp.OrderDtl b on a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderLine<>b.OrderLine 
inner join erp.OrderHed c on c.Company=a.Company and c.OrderNum=a.OrderNum
where 1=1 and a.Company='jctimes' and  a.ProdCode in('401','0918','0910','091020','091031','403','404') 
and b.ProdCode not in('401','0918','0910','091020','091031','403','404','0901') 
and a.PartNum not like '%-100'
and a.RequestDate >'2023-01-01'
 ${if (len(交期开始日期)==0,"","and a.RequestDate >='"+交期开始日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(交期结束日期)==0,"","and a.RequestDate <='"+交期结束日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(下单开始日期)==0,"","and c.OrderDate >='"+下单开始日期+"'")}
  ${if (len(下单结束日期)==0,"","and c.OrderDate <='"+下单结束日期+"'")}

SELECT DISTINCT  *
FROM (
    SELECT 
        a.Character01 AS 项目负责人,
        a.Character02 AS 销售负责人,
        a.OrderNum AS 订单编号,
        a.OrderDate AS 下单日期,
        b.NeedByDate AS 订单交期,
        DATEDIFF(DAY, a.OrderDate, b.NeedByDate) AS 订单周期,
        c.Description AS 类别,
        b.PartNum AS 产品编号,
        b.LineDesc AS 产品描述,
        xldate AS 下料出图,
        scdate AS BOM拆图,
        CASE 
            WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
            WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
            ELSE G.ApprovedDate 
        END AS 澄江到料,
        h.ApprovedDate AS 总厂到料,
        I.ApprovedDate AS 打光检验日期,
        J.ApprovedDate AS 合模日期,
        k.ApprovedDate AS 完工日期,
        l.TranDate AS 入库日期,
        b.Character03 AS 产品状态,
            SUM(CASE 
                WHEN (ISNULL(K.ApprovedDate, '') <> '' 
                  OR ISNULL(l.TranDate, '') <> '' 
                  OR b.OpenLine = 0 ) AND Q.ProdCode NOT IN ('0905') and  b.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-096'
                THEN 1 ELSE 0 
            END) OVER (PARTITION BY a.OrderNum, b.Character03) AS 入行库数,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Q.ProdCode NOT IN ('0905') and  b.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-096' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) OVER (PARTITION BY a.OrderNum, b.Character03) AS 订单总行数,
        --ISNULL(NULLIF(M.技术人员, ''), d.Name) AS 技术人员,
		 COALESCE(S.技术人员,M.技术人员,D.NAME,e.name) COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS 技术人员,
        M.客户确认日期,
        N.流道分析日期,
        o.bom AS 零件拆图时长,
        o.runner AS 模流分析时长,
        Procurement AS 采购模料时长,
        chenjiang AS 澄江完工时长,
        zongchang AS 总厂完工时长,
        DATEADD(DAY, 1, 客户确认日期) AS 计划下料出图,
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(流道分析日期, '') = '' THEN NULL 
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, runner, 客户确认日期) 
        END AS 计划模流分析,

       CASE WHEN     c.Description NOT in (N'计量泵',N'分配器',N'合流器',N'换网器',N'静态混合器',N'连接器') then 
         CASE 
            WHEN (ISNULL(流道分析日期, '') = '' OR 流道分析日期 < 客户确认日期  ) 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, bom, 客户确认日期)
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, bom, 流道分析日期)
        END 
		else 
		CASE 
            WHEN (ISNULL(流道分析日期, '') = '' OR 流道分析日期 < 客户确认日期  ) 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, 4, 客户确认日期)
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, 4, 流道分析日期)
        END 
		end
		AS 计划BOM拆图,
        convert(varchar(10), p.dhdate,120) AS 计划澄江到料,
        DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
          case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
            scdate,
            p.dhdate,
            CASE 
                WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                ELSE G.ApprovedDate 
            END
        )) AS 计划总厂到料,
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(h.ApprovedDate, '') = '' 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.8), 
                DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
                     case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
                    scdate, p.dhdate,
                    CASE WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                         WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                         ELSE G.ApprovedDate END
                ))
            )
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.8), h.ApprovedDate)
        END AS 计划打光检验,
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(h.ApprovedDate, '') = '' 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.9), 
                DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
                     case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
                    scdate, p.dhdate,
                    CASE WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                         WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                         ELSE G.ApprovedDate END
                ))
            )
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, CEILING(zongchang * 0.9), h.ApprovedDate)
        END AS 计划合模,
		  CASE WHEN   c.Description NOT in (N'计量泵',N'分配器',N'合流器',N'换网器',N'静态混合器',N'连接器') then 
        CASE 
            WHEN ISNULL(h.ApprovedDate, '') = '' 
            THEN DATEADD(DAY, zongchang, 
                DATEADD(DAY, chenjiang, dbo.GetMaxDate(
                    case when ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')=''  OR (ISNULL(流道分析日期,'')<>'' AND 流道分析日期 <客户确认日期 ) THEN DATEADD(DAY,bom,客户确认日期 )
  else   DATEADD(DAY,bom,流道分析日期)   END ,
                    scdate, p.dhdate,
                    CASE WHEN b.PartNum = '260409' THEN '2026-04-01'
                         WHEN ISNULL(gg.PartNum, '') <> '' AND ISNULL(g.CPNum, '') = '' THEN '1900-01-01'
                         ELSE G.ApprovedDate END
                ))
            )
            ELSE DATEADD(DAY, zongchang, h.ApprovedDate)
        END
		 else  b.NeedByDate  end
		AS 计划完工,
           case when a.OrderNum='258059' THEN N'备用' ELSE  Q.Character11 END AS 项目备注,r.配套时间,case when b1.PartNum is null then N'否' else N'是' end  是否含配件,CycleTotal 总周期
    ,B.DATE19
	FROM OrderHed a
    INNER JOIN OrderDtl b 
        ON a.OrderNum = b.OrderNum AND a.Company = b.Company
	LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT OrderNum,PartNum,OrderLine FROM #AAA)b1 on b.OrderNum=b1.OrderNum and b.PartNum=b1.PartNum and b.OrderLine=b1.OrderLine
    
    LEFT JOIN (
     	select * from (SELECT A.PartNum,   b.Name,   xldate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PARTNUM ORDER BY A.PartNum,A.ApprovedDate) NUM
        FROM erp.PartRev a
		INNER JOIN (
		SELECT PartNum, RevisionNum, convert(varchar(10),min( ApprovedDate),120) AS xldate from 
		ERPLOG.dbo.RCOCHECKLOG  group by PartNum, RevisionNum) C ON A.PartNum =C.PartNum  COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS AND A.RevisionNum=C.RevisionNum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
        INNER JOIN UserFile b ON a.ApprovedBy = b.DcdUserID 
        WHERE (  RevShortDesc LIKE N'%下料版%' ) --and a.PartNum='251227-200'
          --AND a.ApprovedBy NOT LIKE 'manager'
		  ) a where a.num=1
    ) d ON b.PartNum = d.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        
		select * from (SELECT A.PartNum,   b.Name,   scdate,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY A.PARTNUM ORDER BY A.PartNum,A.ApprovedDate) NUM
        FROM erp.PartRev a
		INNER JOIN (
		SELECT PartNum, RevisionNum, convert(varchar(10),min( ApprovedDate),120) AS scdate from 
		ERPLOG.dbo.RCOCHECKLOG  group by PartNum, RevisionNum) C ON A.PartNum =C.PartNum  COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS AND A.RevisionNum=C.RevisionNum COLLATE Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
        INNER JOIN UserFile b ON a.ApprovedBy = b.DcdUserID 
        WHERE (RevShortDesc LIKE N'%生产版%' OR RevShortDesc = '1') --and a.PartNum='251227-200'
          --AND a.ApprovedBy NOT LIKE 'manager'
		  ) a where a.num=1
     
    ) e ON b.PartNum = e.PartNum  
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT a.JobNum, a.PartNum
        FROM erp.JobHead a
        LEFT JOIN erp.JobProd b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE a.PartNum NOT LIKE '%-zz' 
          AND ISNULL(WarehouseCode, '') = ''
    ) f ON f.PartNum = b.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT a.CPNum, 
               CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = COUNT(TranDate) THEN MAX(TranDate) ELSE NULL END AS ApprovedDate
        FROM ApplyDataMl a
        LEFT JOIN PODetail b 
            ON a.ApplyNum = b.Character05 AND a.ApplyLine = b.Number03
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT PoNum, PoLine, MAX(ReceiptDate) AS TranDate
            FROM erp.RcvDtl
            WHERE Company = 'jctimes'
            GROUP BY PoNum, PoLine
        ) c ON b.PoNum = c.PoNum AND b.PoLine = c.PoLine
        GROUP BY a.CPNum
    ) g ON b.PartNum = g.CPNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT PartNum 
        FROM tempdata.dbo.MrpTDL
    ) gg ON b.PartNum = gg.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT a.CPNum, MAX(DHDate) AS DHDate
        FROM ApplyDataMl a
        GROUP BY a.CPNum
    ) p ON b.PartNum = p.CPNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT c.PartNum,-- Date19 ,PayrollDate,ApprovedDate
               CASE WHEN SUM(CAST(C.OpComplete AS FLOAT)) = COUNT(*) 
                    THEN convert(varchar(10),MAX(date19),120) ELSE NULL END AS ApprovedDate
        FROM (
            SELECT c.JobNum,b.PartNum, c.AssemblySeq, OpCode, OprSeq, LaborEntryMethod, c.Company, OpComplete,Date19,
                   ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY c.JobNum, c.AssemblySeq, c.Company 
                                      ORDER BY c.Company, c.JobNum, c.AssemblySeq, c.OprSeq) AS num
            FROM JobOper c
			INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON c.JobNum = b.JobNum AND c.Company = b.Company
			inner join erp.JobAsmbl d on c.JobNum =d.JobNum and c.AssemblySeq =d.AssemblySeq and c.Company =d.Company 
            WHERE   OpCode =  '680'  and d.Description not like N'%模唇%'     and d.Description not like N'%微调座%'    
              AND LaborEntryMethod = 'T' and c.OpComplete=1
              AND CheckBox01 = 0 --AND  C.JobNum ='251659-1-2'
        ) c
       
        INNER JOIN erp.JobMtl d 
            ON c.JobNum = d.JobNum 
            AND c.AssemblySeq = d.AssemblySeq 
            AND c.Company = d.Company
        INNER JOIN (
            SELECT DISTINCT PartNum, CPNum, Company 
            FROM ApplyDataMl
        ) e ON d.PartNum = e.PartNum AND d.Company = e.Company
        WHERE  c.num = 1 --AND  C.JobNum ='251659-1-2'
        GROUP BY c.PartNum
 
    ) h ON b.PartNum = h.PartNum
       LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT B.PartNum,  MAX(convert(varchar(10),Date19,120)) ApprovedDate
        FROM  JobOper a
        INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE OpCode = '730' AND A.OpComplete=1
         GROUP BY B.PartNum 
    ) i ON b.PartNum = i.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT B.PartNum, MAX(convert(varchar(10),Date19,120))  AS ApprovedDate
        FROM JobOper a
        INNER JOIN ERP.JobHead b 
            ON a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.Company = b.Company
        WHERE OpCode IN ('270', '401') AND A.OpComplete=1
        GROUP BY B.PartNum 
    ) j ON b.PartNum = j.PartNum
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT B.PartNum,  MAX(convert(varchar(10),Date19,120)) AS ApprovedDate
        FROM JobOper a

) h on h.PartNum =a.PartNum and h.Company =a.Company  and 发货时间二>=a.RMADate 
left join Erp.Customer i on h.CustNum=i.CustNum and h.Company =i.Company 
left join (SELECT PartNum,SUM(OnhandQty) OnhandQty FROM ERP.PARTBIN GROUP BY PartNum ) L ON A.PartNum=L.PartNum
left join (select DISTINCT A.PartNum ,A.Company,CreateDate   from Erp.JobHead A INNER JOIN #temp B ON A.PartNum like '%'+a.PartNum+'%' AND CreateDate >=RMADate 

where A.PartNum like '%wx%'  ) j on j.PartNum like '%'+a.PartNum+'%'  and j.Company =a.Company  and j.CreateDate >=a.RMADate 
order by rownum 
drop table #temp

coreJoins: PUB.OrderDtl -> PUB.JobProd ON Company + OrderLine + OrderNum
PUB.JobProd -> PUB.OrderRel ON Company + OrderLine + OrderNum
PUB.Customer -> PUB.ShipTo ON Company + CustNum + ShipToNum
PUB.ShipTo -> PUB.CustCnt ON Company + CustNum + ShipToNum
families.representativeSql:
SELECT A.CheckBox17,A.CheckBox18,A.CheckBox19,A.Date20,A.Date19,A.OrderNum,A.PartNum,A.LineDesc,A.SalesUM,A.OrderQty,ifnull(G.Qty1,0) AS qty1,
ifnull(G.qty2,0) AS Qty2,ifnull(G.qty3,0) AS Qty3,
A.OrderComment,C.EntryPerson,E.Name,
E.Address1+E.Address2+E.Address3 AS Address,F.PhoneNum,F.CellPhoneNum,F.FaxNum,F.Name AS cname,A.Date17,A.Character09,A.OrderLine,
D.Country,A.Character10,A.shortChar10,A.ShipComment,aa.JobNum
FROM PUB.OrderDtl A 
LEFT JOIN PUB.JobProd aa ON (a.Company = aa.Company AND A.OrderNum = aa.OrderNum AND A.OrderLine = aa.OrderLine)
LEFT JOIN PUB.OrderRel B ON (A.Company=B.Company AND A.OrderNum=B.OrderNum AND A.OrderLine=B.OrderLine) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.OrderHed C ON (B.Company=C.Company AND B.OrderNum=C.OrderNum) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.Customer D ON (C.Company=D.Company AND C.CustNum=D.CustNum) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.ShipTo E ON (D.CustNum=E.CustNum AND D.Company=E.Company AND B.ShipToNum=E.ShipToNum) 
LEFT JOIN PUB.CustCnt F ON (F.Company=E.Company AND F.CustNum=E.CustNum AND F.ShipToNum=E.ShipToNum AND B.ShpConNum=F.ConNum) 
LEFT JOIN ( 
SELECT A1.Company, 
A1.PartNum, 
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='cpc001' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty1,
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='cpc002' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty2,
sum(CASE WHEN A1.WarehouseCode='ysc' THEN A1.OnHandQty ELSE 0 END) AS qty3
FROM PUB.PartWhse A1 
WHERE A1.WarehouseCode IN ('cpc001','cpc002','ysc') AND A1.Company='jctimes'
Group By A1.Company,A1.PartNum 
) G ON (A.PartNum=G.PartNum AND A.Company=G.Company)
WHERE A.Company='jctimes' AND B.OpenRelease=1 AND A.KitCompOrigSeq=0 AND A.CheckBox20=1 AND a.prodcode LIKE '%0910%'
order by A.date19

coreJoins: Erp.PODetail -> Erp.PORel ON Company + POLine + PONUM
Erp.APInvDtl -> Erp.APInvHed ON Company + InvoiceNum + VendorNum
families.representativeReportName: 数据钻取子报表订单明细
families.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.DocUnitCost,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,
e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease,f.OnHandQty ,f.WarehouseCode,g.Description AS zdms,g.LineType,g.ExtCost,g.DocExtCost,h.InvoiceNum,h.InvoiceDate
FROM erp.POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN erp.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN erp.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
LEFT JOIN erp.PartWhse f ON (f.Company = b.Company AND  b.PartNum = f.PartNum)
left JOIN Erp.APInvDtl g ON (g.Company=a.Company AND g.Ponum=a.PONum)
LEFT JOIN Erp.APInvHed h 
ON (g.Company = h.Company AND g.InvoiceNum = h.InvoiceNum AND g.VendorNum =h.VendorNum)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2020-3-1' AND a.Approve ='1'
and a.PONum =${订单号}
order by e.DueDate desc

Erp.JobOper -> Erp.JobAsmbl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum
Erp.JobAsmbl -> Erp.LaborDtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum + OprSeq
families.representativeReportName: 采购阶段每日到料情况
families.representativeSql:
SELECT convert(nvarchar(10),e.date20 ,120), 
count(f.Description)
 FROM erp.JobHead a 
LEFT JOIN erp.JobProd b
ON a.JobNum =b.JobNum and a.Company = b.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.OrderHed c
ON b.OrderNum = c.OrderNum AND b.Company = c.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.OrderDtl d
ON b.OrderNum= d.OrderNum AND b.OrderLine = d.OrderLine AND b.OrderRelNum = b.OrderRelNum AND b.Company= d.Company
LEFT JOIN JobOper e	
ON a.JobNum = e.JobNum AND a.Company = e.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.JobAsmbl AS f
ON f.JobNum= e.JobNum AND f.AssemblySeq=e.AssemblySeq AND f.Company=e.Company
LEFT JOIN erp.LaborDtl AS g
ON g.JobNum=e.JobNum AND g.AssemblySeq=e.AssemblySeq AND g.OprSeq = e.OprSeq AND g.Company= e.Company

WHERE a.company='jctimes' and e.date20 >=getdate()-19
 AND A.CREATEDATE>='2020-1-1' AND e.OpComplete <>'1' and e.opcode like 'wb%'
 GROUP BY convert(nvarchar(10),e.date20 ,120)

coreJoins: Erp.PODetail -> Erp.PORel ON Company + POLine + PONUM
families.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,b.poline,a.BuyerID,a.TermsCode,f.Description,
case when 
a.termscode = '01' then N'现结'
when a.termscode = '23' then N'现结'
else N'月结' end as tk,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.openLine,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease FROM POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)
LEFT JOIN erp.Vendor c ON (a.VendorNum = c.VendorNum AND c.Company = a.Company)
LEFT JOIN erp.PurAgent d ON (d.BuyerID= a.BuyerID AND d.Company = a.Company )
left join erp.PurTerms f on (f.company = a.company and f.termscode = a.termscode)
WHERE a.Company ='jctimes' AND a.OrderDate >='2024-1-1' AND a.Approve ='1'
AND c.VendorID <>'1019' and d.name not in (N'段冬梅',N'董君君',N'孙佳盼',N'黄安娜',N'章晶晶')
and a.Character01 not in(N'精一新材料',N'何金伟') and d.buyerid<>'05'

 ${if (len(采购员)==0,"","and d.Name='"+采购员+"'")}
order by  case when 
a.termscode = '01' then N'现结'
when a.termscode = '23' then N'现结'
else N'月结' end desc,e.duedate asc

coreJoins: Erp.PODetail -> Erp.PORel ON Company + POLine + PONUM
families.representativeSql:
SELECT a.OrderDate,a.PONum,a.Approve,a.OpenOrder,VendorID,a.Character01 as fqr,
b.PartNum,b.LineDesc,b.Character01,b.XOrderQty,b.openLine,c.Name AS gys,d.Name AS cgy ,e.DueDate ,e.OpenRelease FROM erp.POHeader a
LEFT JOIN PODetail b ON (a.Company = b.Company AND a.PONum = b.PONUM)
LEFT JOIN erp.PORel e  ON (b.Company = e.Company AND b.POLine = e.POLine AND b.PONUM = e.PONum)

AND c.VendorID <>'1019' 
 ${if (len(采购员)==0,"","and d.Name='"+采购员+"'")}
order by  ${cname} ${orderby}

families.representativeReportName: 采购阶段每日到料情况
families.representativeSql:
SELECT  A.ParentPhase,A.SortSeq,A.ProjectID,A.PhaseID,A.Description,A.StartDate,A.DueDate,
A.Number01,a.Number02,A.date20,A.DateComplete,A.PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' WHEN A.PhaseStatus='C' THEN N'完成' ELSE N'未开始' END AS PhaseStatus,
CASE WHEN A.PhaseStatus='I' THEN N'加工中' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete > A.DueDate) THEN N'延期完成' 
WHEN (A.PhaseStatus='C'  and A.DateComplete <= A.DueDate) THEN N'正常完成' 
ELSE N'未开始' END AS fxPhaseStatus,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.Date20,120)+' '+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number01/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number01-floor(A.Number01/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) AS TDate20,
convert(nvarchar(10),A.DateComplete,120)+' '+ RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor(A.Number02/3600) AS CHAR(2))),2)+':'+RIGHT('0'+Rtrim(CAST(floor((A.Number02-floor(A.Number02/3600)*3600)/60) AS CHAR(2))),2) as TDateComplete,
A.PercentComplete,A.Duration,CASE WHEN A.DurationType='D' THEN N'天' ELSE N'小时' END AS DurationType,
A.Character01,B.Description AS pDesc,A.CheckBox20,A.Character10 ,A.Character02,c.Name ,b.StartDate,b.EndDate
FROM ProjPhase A 
INNER JOIN erp.Project B ON (A.ProjectID=B.ProjectID AND A.Company=B.Company) 
LEFT JOIN erp.UserFile c
ON a.Character01 = c.DcdUserID
inner JOIN erp.PORel e ON (a.ProjectID=e.ProjectID AND A.Company = e.Company AND a.PhaseID = e.WBSPhaseID)
WHERE A.Company='jctimes'  AND A.ParentPhase = N'采购部' and A.DueDate >='2020-3-1' and A.DueDate <='2020-12-31' 
AND a.PhaseStatus ='C'
order by A.DateComplete desc

coreJoins: Erp.OrderDtl -> Erp.OrderRel ON Company + OrderLine + OrderNum
families.representativeSql:
with AAA(RequestDate,PartNum,LineDesc,OrderNum,No )
AS(
select a.RequestDate,a.PartNum,a.LineDesc,a.OrderNum
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY a.RequestDate ORDER BY a.RequestDate,a.OrderNum) No
from OrderDtl  a 
inner join erp.OrderRel b on a.Company=b.Company and a.OrderNum=b.OrderNum and a.OrderLine=b.OrderLine
where a.ProdCode in ('0910','0918','091031')  AND A.COMPANY='JCTIMES'
and a.RequestDate>'2026-01-01' and a.PartNum not like '%-100'
and a.PartNum not like '%-096'
and a.PartNum not like 'JK-%'
and a.PartNum not like '%-095'
and a.SalesCatID<>'0004'
and a.Character03<>N'暂停'
and a.CustNum<>839086
 ${ if(len(date1) == 0,""," and a.RequestDate>='"+ date1+"' ")}
 ${ if(len(date2) == 0,""," and a.RequestDate<='"+ date2+"' ")}
and (b.OurJobShippedQty+b.OurStockShippedQty>0 or b.OpenRelease=1)
--order by a.RequestDate,a.OrderNum 
)

select a.RequestDate,b.No,c.*
from (
	SELECT distinct RequestDate FROM AAA
)a 
inner join (
	SELECT distinct No FROM AAA
) b on 1=1
left join AAA c on c.RequestDate=a.RequestDate and c.No=b.No
order by a.RequestDate,b.No

coreJoins: PUB.JobAsmbl -> PUB.JobMtl ON Company + AssemblySeq + JobNum

SELECT a.jobnum,a.partnum,a.description,a.qtyper,b.MtlSeq,b.PartNum AS mpartnum,b.Description AS mdesc,c.PartNum AS cppartnum,c.PartDescription,a.jobnum,b.IssuedQty,b.IssuedComplete,
b.qtyper AS mqtyper,b.RequiredQty,b.ium,b.MfgComment FROM PUB.JobAsmbl AS a
LEFT JOIN PUB.JobMtl b
ON a.Company = b.Company AND a.JobNum = b.JobNum AND a.AssemblySeq = b.AssemblySeq
LEFT JOIN PUB.JobHead c
ON c.Company = a.Company AND c.JobNum = a.JobNum
WHERE  a.Company ='jctimes' 
AND a.description like '%销售套件%' 
${if (len(产品编号)==0,"","and a.jobnum='"+产品编号+"'")}
order by b.issuedComplete asc
